Build a premium landing page for 'Veloce' — a smart electric scooter subscription service. The page should have a hero section with a bold tagline and a 'Start Riding' CTA, a 3-step how-it-works section, a pricing section with 3 tiers (Starter, Pro, Unlimited), social proof with user avatars and a star rating, and a minimal footer. Use a dark background with neon green accents. Make it feel sleek and urban.

Build a conversion-focused landing page for 'PillowTalk' — a sleep-tracking smart pillow that adjusts firmness automatically. Include a hero with product image placeholder and headline, a feature grid with 4 icons, a comparison table (PillowTalk vs generic pillow), an email signup form, and a footer. Use a calming palette: deep navy, soft lavender, warm white. Typography should feel gentle and premium.

Build a SaaS landing page for 'StackBrief' — an AI tool that generates executive summaries from long Slack threads and email chains. The page needs a hero with a demo animation placeholder, a 'Before/After' section showing messy threads vs clean summary, 3 feature cards with micro-illustrations, a testimonial carousel section, and a 'Get Early Access' CTA. Use a clean white background with indigo and orange accents. Feel modern and developer-friendly.

Build a luxury landing page for 'Solara' — a portable solar-powered espresso machine for camping and travel. Include a full-bleed hero with a dramatic product shot placeholder and overlaid text, a horizontal scroll feature strip, a 'Featured in' logo bar (use placeholder names), a lifestyle gallery grid (4 images), and a CTA to pre-order. Color palette: warm sand, espresso brown, cream. Feel artisanal and premium.

Build a landing page for 'NeuroPet' — an AI-powered virtual pet app that helps users build healthy habits. Include a hero with a cute animated pet placeholder, a habit tracker mockup section, a gamification feature list with badge icons, a leaderboard preview, and a download CTA with App Store/Play Store badges. Use a playful palette: soft coral, mint green, bright yellow on a light background. Feel fun and encouraging.

Build a minimalist landing page for 'Modu' — a modular, sustainable home office furniture brand. The page should feature a hero section with a clean product shot and a 'Customize Your Desk' CTA, an interactive assembly visualization section, a materials transparency section highlighting recycled wood and steel, and a customer gallery. Use a Scandi-inspired palette: forest green, oatmeal, and slate grey. Typography should be a spacious sans-serif. Feel grounded and eco-conscious.

Build a sophisticated landing page for 'EstateX' — a platform for fractional real estate investment. Include a hero section with a high-end property video placeholder and a bold value proposition, a 'Live Opportunities' grid showing property cards with ROI percentages, a trust-building section with security certifications and partner logos, a simple 3-step investment process, and a CTA to create a free account. Use a professional palette: deep emerald, charcoal, and brushed gold. Feel secure and exclusive.

Build a high-tech landing page for 'GlowAI' — a personalized skincare platform that analyzes selfies to formulate custom serums. Include a hero section with a facial scanning animation placeholder, a 'Science Behind the Glow' section with 4 technical icons, a 'Before & After' interactive slider, a product ingredient spotlight, and a 'Take the Skin Quiz' CTA. Use a clean, clinical palette: pearl white, rose quartz, and soft silver. Feel scientific and premium.

Build a futuristic landing page for 'VaultKey' — a zero-knowledge cloud storage service for creative professionals. The page needs a hero with an abstract encryption-themed background, a 'Features' section highlighting end-to-end encryption and lightning-fast syncing, a pricing table with 3 tiers (Creator, Studio, Enterprise), a developer API documentation preview, and a footer with social links. Use a dark mode design: obsidian black with electric purple and cyan accents. Feel ultra-secure and cutting-edge.

Build an immersive landing page for 'LingoVerse' — a VR-based language learning app that drops users into simulated foreign cities. Include a hero with a vibrant 360-degree environment placeholder, a 'Choose Your Destination' carousel showing Tokyo, Paris, and Mexico City, a gamification section highlighting XP and badges, a community 'Live Meetup' preview, and App Store download buttons. Use a high-energy palette: sky blue, sunset orange, and cloud white. Feel adventurous and social.

Build a high-energy landing page for 'Zenith' — a premium wearable that tracks metabolic health in real-time. The page should feature a hero with a high-motion athlete video placeholder and a 'Join the Waitlist' CTA, a data visualization section showing glucose and heart rate graphs, a 3-column 'Performance Pillars' section, and a scientific advisory board profile strip. Use a dark mode aesthetic: carbon fiber black with electric yellow and slate grey. Feel high-performance and elite.

Build a rustic yet modern landing page for 'Harvestly' — a farm-to-table subscription service delivering heirloom produce. Include a hero with a panoramic farmhouse kitchen photo and a 'View This Week’s Box' CTA, a 'Meet the Farmers' interactive map, a seasonal availability calendar, and a customer recipe carousel. Use an earthy palette: terracotta, sage green, and warm cream. Typography should be a classic serif paired with a clean sans-serif. Feel wholesome and transparent.

Build a vibrant SaaS landing page for 'Flux' — a no-code workflow automation tool for marketing agencies. The page needs a hero with a drag-and-drop interface animation, a 'Integrations' logo cloud featuring 20+ app icons, a split-screen section comparing 'Manual Work' vs 'Flux Automation', and a tiered pricing table (Freelancer, Agency, Enterprise). Use a bright, optimistic palette: cobalt blue, electric pink, and white. Feel fast, creative, and intuitive.

Build a cinematic landing page for 'Aura' — a smart home ambient lighting system that syncs with movies and music. Include a full-width hero showing a cozy living room transforming with light colors, a 'Sync Your World' feature grid with 4 icons, a technical specs accordion section, and a gallery of user-submitted 'Room Setups'. Use a deep midnight background with vibrant gradient accents of violet and teal. Feel atmospheric and futuristic.

Build a professional landing page for 'Cipher' — a cybersecurity suite designed specifically for small business owners. The page should have a hero with a 'Security Score' scanner mockup and a 'Get Your Free Audit' CTA, a 'Threat Protection' checklist, a section for industry-specific case studies (Retail, Healthcare, Tech), and a testimonial section with trust badges (ISO, SOC2). Use a stable, corporate palette: navy blue, steel silver, and alert orange. Feel dependable and authoritative.

Build an elegant landing page for 'Velour' — a high-end fragrance subscription service that sends curated scent vials monthly. Use a sophisticated palette: champagne gold, deep burgundy, and soft ivory. Feel romantic and luxurious.

Build a bold landing page for 'Apex' — an e-sports coaching platform where pro players provide 1-on-1 feedback. Use a high-contrast palette: matte black, neon red, and bright white. Feel aggressive and competitive.

Build a serene landing page for 'Kindle & Co' — a luxury candle brand that uses AI to create personalized scents based on your memories. Include a hero with a minimalist product shot and a 'Begin Your Sensory Journey' CTA, a 3-step 'Process' section (Describe, Formulate, Pour), a 'Sustainability' section highlighting soy wax and wood wicks, and a social feed of aesthetic home interiors. Use a muted palette: warm taupe, dusty rose, and charcoal. Feel calming and artisanal.

Build a technical landing page for 'BitForge' — a cloud-based IDE for developing blockchain smart contracts. The page should have a hero with a code snippet editor placeholder, a 'One-Click Deploy' feature list, a security auditing tool preview, and a community 'Template Library' grid. Use a developer-centric palette: terminal green, deep grey, and bright purple. Feel robust and developer-first.

Build a whimsical landing page for 'BloomBox' — an automated indoor smart garden that grows rare exotic flowers. Include a hero with a time-lapse animation placeholder of a blooming flower, a 'What’s Inside' exploded-view diagram of the hydroponic system, a 4-card feature list (Auto-Water, LED Sun, App Control, Nutrient Pods), and a 'Join the Green Revolution' CTA. Use a fresh palette: mint, lemon yellow, and sky blue. Feel joyful and innovative.
